text:
prior to any adjustments made for payments. Each payment year has specific risk models that are based on that year’s risk adjustment methodology; payment years may use a blend of MOF risk scores as inputs to calculate the operational payment risk scores.
Depending on the payment year, the risk models that are used for MAO payments may include:
- ESRD V21 scores (based on model calibration year)
- Part C V21 scores
- Part C V22 scores
- Part C V23 scores
- Part C V24 scores
- Part D V05
